title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Birlasoft International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Birlasoft International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birlasoft International Enterprises:
Birlasoft International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft International Enterprises!
